requirement_topic.en: OCPP Interoperability and IEC 61000 EMC Requirements

summary.en: For networked public EV chargers in Cambodia, OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) is the internationally adopted back-office communication standard and is expected by charge-point operators, international project funders, and fleet operators deploying IEC-aligned infrastructure. OCPP enables remote monitoring, fault notification, access control, energy management, and reporting functions required for commercial charge-point operations. EMC (electromagnetic compatibility) requirements in Cambodia follow ISC-adopted IEC 61000 series standards, which set limits for conducted and radiated emissions and immunity requirements for electrical equipment including EV charging stations. IEC 61000-3-2 (harmonic current limits), IEC 61000-3-3 (voltage fluctuations), and IEC 61000-4 series (immunity tests) are the applicable EMC framework for EV chargers in Cambodia's IEC-aligned regulatory environment.
summary.zh: 对于柬埔寨联网公共电动汽车充电桩，OCPP（开放充电点协议）是国际通行的后台通信标准，充电点运营商、国际项目资助方以及部署IEC体系基础设施的车队运营商均预期采用。OCPP支持商业充电点运营所需的远程监控、故障通知、访问控制、能源管理和报告功能。柬埔寨的EMC（电磁兼容性）要求遵循ISC采纳的IEC 61000系列标准，为包括电动汽车充电站在内的电气设备设定传导和辐射发射限值及抗扰度要求。IEC 61000-3-2（谐波电流限值）、IEC 61000-3-3（电压波动）和IEC 61000-4系列（抗扰度测试）是柬埔寨IEC体系监管环境下充电桩适用的EMC框架。
summary.zht: 對於柬埔寨聯網公共電動汽車充電樁，OCPP（開放充電點協議）是國際通行的後台通訊標準，充電點運營商、國際項目資助方以及部署IEC體系基礎設施的車隊運營商均預期採用。OCPP支持商業充電點運營所需的遠程監控、故障通知、訪問控制、能源管理和報告功能。柬埔寨的EMC（電磁兼容性）要求遵循ISC採納的IEC 61000系列標準，為包括電動汽車充電站在內的電氣設備設定傳導和輻射發射限值及抗擾度要求。IEC 61000-3-2（諧波電流限值）、IEC 61000-3-3（電壓波動）和IEC 61000-4系列（抗擾度測試）是柬埔寨IEC體系監管環境下充電樁適用的EMC框架。

standards_or_laws: OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) — back-office communication standard for networked EV chargers
IEC 61000-3-2 — Limits for harmonic current emissions (equipment input current up to and including 16 A per phase)
IEC 61000-3-3 — Limitation of voltage changes, voltage fluctuations and flicker
IEC 61000-4 series — Electromagnetic compatibility immunity tests
ISC (Institute of Standards of Cambodia) adopted IEC 61000 standards — isc.gov.kh
IEC 63584 — Standard for OCPP adoption in EV charging (international context)

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use the GB/T 27930-2023 communication protocol (CAN bus between off-board charger and battery management system), which is not interoperable with OCPP back-office systems or the CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 communication stack. China AC chargers may implement OCPP-based back-office protocols for network management, but the underlying connector and signaling stack uses CC/CP rather than the PP/CP signaling required for IEC 62196 Type 2 and OCPP-integrated systems. China EMC baselines for EV chargers reference GB/T series EMC standards, which differ from the IEC 61000 series adopted by ISC for Cambodia.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023通信协议（非车载充电机与电池管理系统之间的CAN总线协议），与OCPP后台系统或CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈不兼容。中国交流充电桩可能采用基于OCPP的后台协议进行网络管理，但底层接口和信号栈使用CC/CP，而非IEC 62196 Type 2和OCPP集成系统所要求的PP/CP信号。中国充电桩EMC基线参考GB/T系列EMC标准，与ISC为柬埔寨采纳的IEC 61000系列不同。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023通訊協議（非車載充電機與電池管理系統之間的CAN總線協議），與OCPP後台系統或CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧不兼容。中國交流充電樁可能採用基於OCPP的後台協議進行網絡管理，但底層接口和信號棧使用CC/CP，而非IEC 62196 Type 2和OCPP集成系統所要求的PP/CP信號。中國充電樁EMC基線參考GB/T系列EMC標準，與ISC為柬埔寨採納的IEC 61000系列不同。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system
GB 17625 series — China EMC harmonic current limits
GB/T 17626 series — China EMC immunity standards

gap.en: Exporters must confirm: (1) the charger firmware supports OCPP (version as required by the Cambodia charge-point operator or project owner) for networked public deployments; (2) for DC stations, GB/T 27930 DC communication is replaced with the IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 communication stack for CCS2 compatibility; (3) IEC 61000-series EMC test reports (emissions and immunity) are obtained from an ILAC-accredited laboratory; (4) harmonic injection and power-factor data are prepared for EDC grid-connection review; (5) remote monitoring and fault-reporting functions meet the charge-point operator's platform requirements. A charger with only GB/T 27930 DC communication and no OCPP implementation cannot interoperate with IEC-aligned back-office systems in Cambodia.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认：(1) 充电桩固件支持OCPP（版本符合柬埔寨充电点运营商或项目业主要求），用于联网公共部署；(2) 对于直流充电站，将GB/T 27930直流通信替换为IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈以实现CCS2兼容；(3) 从ILAC认可实验室获取IEC 61000系列EMC测试报告（发射和抗扰度）；(4) 为EDC并网审查准备谐波注入和功率因数数据；(5) 远程监控和故障报告功能符合充电点运营商平台要求。仅支持GB/T 27930直流通信且无OCPP实现的充电桩无法与柬埔寨IEC体系后台系统互操作。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認：(1) 充電樁固件支持OCPP（版本符合柬埔寨充電點運營商或項目業主要求），用於聯網公共部署；(2) 對於直流充電站，將GB/T 27930直流通訊替換為IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧以實現CCS2兼容；(3) 從ILAC認可實驗室獲取IEC 61000系列EMC測試報告（發射和抗擾度）；(4) 為EDC併網審查準備諧波注入和功率因數數據；(5) 遠程監控和故障報告功能符合充電點運營商平台要求。僅支持GB/T 27930直流通訊且無OCPP實現的充電樁無法與柬埔寨IEC體系後台系統互操作。

mandatory_status.target: OCPP: Mandatory in practice for networked public chargers aligned with international charge-point operators and IEC infrastructure in Cambodia; EMC: Mandatory per ISC-adopted IEC 61000 series for electrical equipment
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is mandatory for China domestic DC charging communication; it is not OCPP-compatible; China GB/T EMC reports are not IEC 61000 compliance evidence without gap assessment

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] OCPP back-office integration is a practical requirement for commercial networked EV chargers in Cambodia's IEC-aligned market. IEC 61000 EMC evidence is required under ISC-adopted standards. Chargers with only GB/T 27930 DC communication cannot interoperate with IEC-aligned back-office systems without firmware and communication-stack redesign.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] OCPP后台集成是柬埔寨IEC体系市场商业联网充电桩的实际要求。ISC采纳标准要求提供IEC 61000 EMC证据。仅支持GB/T 27930直流通信的充电桩在不进行固件和通信栈重新设计的情况下，无法与IEC体系后台系统互操作。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] OCPP後台集成是柬埔寨IEC體系市場商業聯網充電樁的實際要求。ISC採納標準要求提供IEC 61000 EMC證據。僅支持GB/T 27930直流通訊的充電樁在不進行固件和通訊棧重新設計的情況下，無法與IEC體系後台系統互操作。
